headline: Align Technology Inc (NASDAQ:ALGN) as a Decent Value Opportunity
summary: Align Technology (ALGN) scores 7/10 on a decent value screen, with a low 15.34 P/E, zero debt, strong profitability, and double-digit EPS growth, making it a high-quality value opportunity.

headline: Align Technology CFO: Global Growth, DSOs Offset North America Demand Pressure
summary: Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) CFO John Morici said the company continues to navigate a challenging but stable demand environment, with international markets and dental service organizations offsetting pressure in parts of North America.
